title: AXNetworkService
description: Service class for network operations including upload, download, and HTTP requests.

types.title: AXNetworkService

props.name: timeout
props.description: Default timeout for network requests in milliseconds.

types.description: Comprehensive network service that handles file uploads, downloads, and HTTP requests with progress tracking and error handling.

methods.name: upload
methods.description: Uploads a file with progress tracking and cancellation support.

methods.name: download
methods.description: Downloads a file with progress tracking and cancellation support.

methods.name: getUploadProgress
methods.description: Returns the progress of an upload task.

methods.name: getDownloadProgress
methods.description: Returns the progress of a download task.

methods.name: setBaseUrl
methods.description: Sets the base URL for API requests.

methods.name: setTimeout
methods.description: Sets the default timeout for network requests.

methods.name: onUploadProgress
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when upload progress updates.

methods.name: onDownloadProgress
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when download progress updates.

methods.name: onUploadComplete
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when upload completes.

methods.name: onDownloadComplete
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when download completes.

methods.name: onNetworkError
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when network errors occur.
